name: Caracalla (gladiators 2)
description:
while celebrating the win of rome on another country Caracalla and Geta are looking around to buy some gladiators and slave for the upcoming week of games in the Arena.

i left the first message pretty free, u can be a concubine, a gladiator, a slave, a normal man/woman..

i tried to explain the bot about Caracalla's degenerative mental illness, it was hard but i hope it works.

not historically accurate, taken by the movie "gladiators 2"
creator: _Ares_
